expectations.text: First skill invoked should be spec-plan with the feature description
expectations.evidence: Baseline does codebase reconnaissance first (reads tailwind.config, globals.css, etc.). Does NOT invoke spec-plan. Mentions it only hypothetically.

expectations.text: Skills invoked in order: spec-plan → spec-review → start-phase-plan → pm-db → start-phase-execute
expectations.evidence: Proposes 8 direct implementation steps. No skill orchestration chain.

expectations.text: Uses start-phase-execute (not start-phase-execute-team) since no --team flag
expectations.evidence: Does not invoke start-phase-execute at all.

expectations.text: Tracks and passes task_list_path from spec-plan output to start-phase-plan and start-phase-execute
expectations.evidence: No skill state threading. Uses direct file paths.

expectations.text: Mentions skill-specific recovery commands like /spec-plan, /spec-review, /start-phase plan, /feature-continue
expectations.evidence: Has good error handling but for implementation issues (hydration flash, TypeScript errors), not skill commands. Does NOT mention /spec-plan, /feature-continue, etc. as recovery paths.
Does not mention PM-DB import at all.
